omitted_declarations.policy_reference: We may also collect information about other software on your device (such as other streaming media services, for the purposes of content discovery and rights management).

We may also receive information from others. For example: Our partners may provide us with information, such as information about their products and services. Our service providers (such as our payment services providers, or customer support providers) may provide us with information, such as updated payment method information or customer service-related information. We may also receive information from our partners, or from other third parties, such as joint marketing partners, and from third party social media platforms. We may also receive information about you from third party data providers, such as demographic data, interest-based data and internet browsing behaviour.

We collect and use information about you for the purposes described below. This includes: your name, email address, payment details, and telephone number; information about your use of the DAZN Service; information from the device you use to access the DAZN Service; information from third parties; and information you provide to us in your communications with us.

We may also collect other information you provide to us, such as when you set your preferences in your account, or provide information through your participation in surveys, or when you provide your date of birth and/or gender.

We may collect information about your credit and debit card details, bank account details, and other payment details to process your payments for the DAZN Service. We use this information to process your payments and to prevent fraud.

We collect information about your use of the DAZN Service, such as the type of content you view, what you watch, when you watch it, and your interactions with the user interface and customer service. This also includes information about your account activity, such as login and logout times, and your purchase history.

We may collect information about your credit and debit card details, bank account details, and other payment details to process your payments for the DAZN Service. We use this information to process your payments and to prevent fraud.

We may collect information about your location from your device or from your network. We may use this information to provide you with location-based services, such as advertising, search results, and other personalized content.

Information you give us. This is information about you that you give us by: filling in forms on the DAZN Service or on our websites (our “Sites”); registering to use our DAZN Service; using the DAZN Service; entering a competition, promotion or survey; and/or corresponding with us by phone, e-mail or otherwise. This information may include your name, address, e-mail address, phone number, date of birth, debit/credit card information, other payment and financial information, personal description and/or photograph.
